segments.text: We have decided to have a Vishnu Maya Puja.
In this context one has know who is the Vishnu Maya and what her, you can call it mythological
but historical relationship?
I've told You that America in the country of Shri Krishna – and He's Kubera as well
And she is Yama.
Because He's Kubera, people have got their affluence – they are rich peopIe and money
more than anywhere else!
But if you do not remember that You've to balance and that Shri Krishna's power
is of Maha Lakshmi, so Mahalakshmi principle
such that where seeking
Is important.
Vishnu principle
It's there when Shri Lakshmi
is His power
After getting the Lakshmi up to a certain point
then you jump into new awareness or
A sort-of-a
Seeking
Which it' s The Seeking Of The Spirit
where the Mahalakshmi principle starts,
that central part.
That far of course in America
it started –
The Maha Lakshmi Principle
but people did not know
they had no discretion
to which way go for their seeking
and so many got enamored by false advertisements
about all kinds promises claims things
I came here long time back
at that moment where I knew the seeking now is showing results and all of people from
over world will try to come down here because there was a market for them.
And their marketing would start in such manner, these who are used to marketing
We'll fall into it.
I came, tried and told them – this is exactly what happened in America that…
…I think i was the first to arrive here, I warned then names of people who will be
doing all these kinds of work also I told there were they last lives?
What kind a thing did you do ? What are their negative powers and how
they try to manipulate.
But nobody would listen because these people found out that the weaknesses of Americans,
if you can pamper them – pamper their ego and tell then this is something very important
—that we should do some thing ah…
That it's very superficial but something looks fantastic as I told You that They
three feet height, and the Americans took to it.
All such absurd ideas they took because they thought that was something new or different
– but they wouldn't listen for Me as I said I won' t take money!
And They told me very clearly nobody will understand you if You don''t take money
so how much would you pay Me?
It is invaluable…
How many are going To Pay Me?
And they had no answer.
So those people who were still money-oriented, so the Mahalakshmi principle was not in them
to understand that if you have to seek truth – You cannot pay for it!
They couldn't understand and this is how we go through all these circles of facing
all kinds of false gurus, all types –
All superficial things.
Ultimately now I think
first year everything has come up very well
but one the chakras
Of this Vishuddhi is as you know
Very important it's that left Vishudhi
and then Left Vishuddhi
in center if its caught-up
You get angina
You get spondylitis and also you get lethargic organs.
So this left Hushidhi has been a sort of fashion with the western people,
maybe because Christianity where
we have to confess or say that
I am a sinner
And you are born as a sinner
Or original sinner
All kinds things
As your branded as a sinner
See always felt guilty
That guilt was built in the Left Hushidhi
I think this is one of the greatest drawback even today, that people in America feel extremely
guilty for very small things because they have no confidence themselves.
Firstly their thing we are a young nation and had not tradition basically . They may
They may look to be very show-offs, but basically inside they feel that we have had no tradition.
We are a young nation like the thing where English is too over sophisticated or French
which are very sophisticated and we're not competitive,
We' re primitive. This kind of a funny ideas they have
And because this you see
They tried to make up
To Make it Up
The path they followed
Ended into all kinds things
It built-up
A very huge Left Vishuddhi in them
That's why Americans are having so many problems
Of the left vishudhi
First of all, this center catches when you do not want to face your mistakes.
I've committed the mistake – it's alright that i have commited now
and why am I going to commit? And just face it! They don't want
they will feel guilty we are done or put in here
like they go on amassing very black clouds
of guilt, then this Vishnumaya who is the thunder we can call –
Who Is The Electrical Charge which is liberated by
friction from these black clouds.
Which actually is a catalyst for rain
It's a catalyst for rain
This start acting on such people
That is, they suddenly get a shock.
They become extremely sensitive people –
the gets nervous and this nervousness
makes them think why are we nervous? What's the problem?
Like exposure of their guilt comes through the Vishnumaya power
Now I have to tell you about also the origin of Vishnumaya, which is very interesting.
Visnumaya was a sister of Shri Krishna who has born after Shri Krishna had been born
actually she not his own sister but he daughter of Nanda and when Shri Krishna
taken over and put in care for Nanda and Yashoda they gave their daughters place
this, and the father of Shri Krishna brought it back.
So when Kansa came – now uncle you all know about that story to ask about eighth child
they said,"This is a child."
He says but he's not man ,this isn't woman .He took her in his hand did like
this and threw it in the sky.
And there she went, and then She announced that Shri Krishna is already incarnated – He
Is living!
…and he's your killer."
So She' s an announcer of all the incarnations…
She''s a announcer for something good which will happen to you also She can burn
things which are not spiritually all right.
At the time of Mahabharata, she was born as Draupadi
and this Draupadi
Was a sister of Shri Rama
And when
As you know in Mahabaratha
All Of You Know The Story Of Mahabharta
I Need Not Tell That
Duryodhana Tried To Take Out Her Clothes
Then She Called For Krishna
First she said, Kri, then put her teeth like this.
Till She said Krishna it was there because She
thinking if She says Shri Rama the thing will fall down and
She'll become exposed as soon As He said Krishna
The think fell done
And that's a time Shri Rama came all
the Shri Krishna came from Dwarika
And Tumsidasji has described it very well, in Hindi language.
In Dwarika there was a big noise you can call it or what I don't know
thunder you can call it, because she was the one who is responsible for thunders.
Shor bhaiyo bhari shankh chakra gada padma garuda layi sidare – with a shanka and
chakra-with Garudha , with Padma all of them he came on the Garuda . With his weapons
Once he came on Garuda to help her, He started supplying the saris for Her and this Duryodhana
got absolutely, Dushyasana did that.
Got absolutely tired & fell down from the ground.
So now here Vishnumaya is a virgin not only she's a Virgin but She exists in all
five elements, as shown that she married Five Pandavas.
And this power of virginity in her used to expose people
To the dangers Of these horrible Kauravas who were going
to rule and destroy the Dharma So She stood back
And she's the one who said that, you have to fight.
You've got a fight for Dharma whatever may happen
and Krishna always supported her
so as brother Shri Krishna supported Her
So relationship between brothers & sisters
are very important in India
also should be with Sahaja Yogis
because we had Rakhi Bandhan
We're all so high
what do call the bhaiyadvij
where on Diwali day we tie up a rakhi to the brother.
Now this Rakhi is nothing but the Mishnumaya's power
which protects her brother,
actually there their brothers protected Her
and now sisters' love protects them.
So that relationship between brother & sister
it much more important than any other relationship
because its so pure
It´s protective
Its loving
And also it is of an equal age, for example between the parents and children cannot be
that.
Or say in-between grandparents can quite imbalanced as well but with brother or sister they have
same age group ,same understanding .And this relationship maintained by this Vishnumaya
we are very good incident on India which I must tell you how this Rakhi bandhan
or this relationship between brother and sister is respected, I mean nobody will believe because
in these countries where there's no relationships which are respected we won't understand.
But when Alexander the Great came to India he conquered our country quite a lot but
then was one King Puru who defeated him put him into jail. Alexander had married
an Indian lady.
So it was a day of this Rakhi Purnima, she put one rakhi in 1 plate and covered up
And sent to the king.
so they said that Rakhi has come!
The King said all right tie-up the raki he didn't know whose Rakhis were when
It is tied He said who's Rakhis are your sisters?
Who Is my sister ? She' s the wife Of this king Alexander, Oh My God !
How could I do such a thing?
He is my brother-in-law.
He immediately went to the jail and prostrated before him, he said,"I'm sorry whatever
This was the graciousness you understand!
How can be so stupid as arresting you?"
Alexander was flabbergasted –he couldn't understand his reaction– he said,"What's
this going on?"
And he said that, now I ask for your forgiveness and please come out with great pomp and show
– with ornaments of his sister.
He sent the brother in law home."
Now this Alexander could not understand it!
Went him to his wife smiling saying what's matter?
How am i here?
She says do you know ,I have saved one thread she showed him a ragi . This thread
She said, you know what is today a day when sister can tie this to her brother and the
brother has do whatever his sister wants.
So I sent it through this Puru, the king – he had released him!
Alexander thought that these Indians are such an enemy like Me on one thread?
How could they rule me out at any time so symbolic of them?
He said, all right.
I'm sorry!
And he took one fellow called Vardayi – Chandavaradai and took him down with a poet with Him
saying now you write poetry because Indians are very subtle people here so how can they
release such horrible enemy like Me only on the thread?
Such trust…
…such understanding of brother for sister
The Sister has to keep that trust also

correct you, to help in any way or expose.
